description: Deterministic thresholds for renewal shadow evaluation. Read-only analytics — does not connect to live execution, throttle, smart replay, or promotion guard. Tune via risk committee; re-run buildRenewalGraduationReport.js after changes.
notes: worstSingleTradeFloor: null = gate disabled; set to e.g. -500 for a fixed currency proxy
Level 4 is never assigned automatically unless thresholds explicitly allow in a future policy version
